items.text:
NOW CASTING:

Looking for an elderly 70-80 year old man to play the role of Grandpa Nick. He should have a look similar to of Robert De Niro- good physic, olive skin, a Mediterranean / Greek look. Very ethnic look. This role does not have any dialogue and would be to shoot one short scene.

scene. 

Also looking to cast a couple female actresses in the 30-40 age range to be background actors in one short scene. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA.

If you are interested in being apart of this project please send me or @bellavlasis a DM!

#castingcalls #shortfilm #actorswanted #castingkids #castingfilm

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL for a SHORT fantasy film - PAID roles- CHICAGO **

**PROJECT TITLE: Shed**

**PROJECT TYPE:** Short film Drama/Fantasy

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:** Searching Productions

**PRODUCTION TEAM: Writer/Director - Stephanie Jeter; EP - Lilly Wachowski**

**UNION STATUS: **Open to union and non-union actors -**PAID**

**PROJECT SYNOPSIS:** A couple’s harmonious relationship begins to unravel when the woman comes home to unexpectedly find a locked shed in her back yard and a husband who won’t tell her what’s inside.

**LOCATION**: Chicago, IL or surrounding area (exact location TBD)

**SHOOT DATES: June 1-June 7**

**ROLES:**

**These roles are for actors local to Chicagoland only**

**LAYLA** - woman, 30-39, Black: A high-achieving soror type whose curiosity might be getting the best of her. 

**RANDALL** - man, 30-39, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: An easygoing and sensitive man in the midst of an identity crisis. 

**LITTLE BOY** - boy, 8-11, Black, Asian, or Indigenous: Newly recovered from a battle with a life-threatening illness he tries his best to present a brave face for his family. (This is a non-speaking role.)

EXPECTED HOURS: TBD

ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION: Transportation reimbursement (capped)

**SUBMISSION DETAILS: Please send a head shot, resume, and reel (if available) to** **ShedFilmChi@gmail.com**, 

**SUBJECT:  ‘Cast submission -***** Role*****’.** 

**Please submit no later than April 29, 2026.**

**If you are invited to audition, we will provide sides and ask that you submit a self-taped audition.*

**CALL BACKS:** Callbacks and chemistry reads will be held between May 4th and May 7th in Chicago.

Follow us on: Instagram **shed.movie**

items.text:
***[Casting Call - Malay Kids Cooking Show]***

The Moving Visuals Co. is currently looking for kids to feature in an upcoming Malay Kids Cooking Show, "Ai Ai Cef 2"

**Details:**

**Film Period: **30th May 2026 - 11th June 2026. Kids are only needed for one day from period mentioned.

**Deadline**

Submit ASAP **(Best By end of April). **Contact the number below if more time is needed.

**Requirements**

1. Aged 7-12

2. Can converse in Malay

3. Fun & Out-Going

4. Have basic cooking skills. (Able to follow a recipe)

If interested do send in a recent photo and one minute video of introducing yourself with answers to the following questions. Video is to be done in Malay.

* What is your favourite food?

* What are the food(s) that you like to cook and why?

For more questions & submission of deliverables, do send in an email to production3@tmvc.sg & CC naqeaosman@tmvc.sg & casting@tmvc.sg

Feel free to contact me ( Iman ) at 9326 3626

sharedPost.text:
Do serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Paweł Olszewski (38) – tata zaginionego Sylwka. Wpatrzony w syna jak w obrazek, jednak jest porywczy i lubił wypić, dlatego stracił rodzinę, Ubiera się w niebieskie jeansy, białe T-shirty i kurtkę skórzaną 4 sceny 
DATA 8.05
STAWKA 600 zł netto

- Kamil Zawora (35) – typ amanta, fajtłapowaty. Cwaniak, ale przygłupi. Chinosy, koszula, kurtka lub sweter.  3 sceny
DATA 7.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Agnieszka Nowińska (31) – zimna i wyrachowana. Wie jak się ustawić. Dla zysku zrobi wszystko. Ubiera się jaskrawo, tandetnie. Uwaga: Blondynka. 3 sceny  –  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
DATA 7.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Lech Matysiak (41) – agresywny, nerwowy. Mechanik samochodowy z wyrokiem w zawiasach za pobicie. Ubrany w strój roboczy – ogrodniczki. 2 sceny 
DATA 8.05
STAWKA 500 zł netto

- Mechanik (27) – Tomasz Labuz, przyzwoicie zbudowany, pyszałkowaty, ubrany w strój roboczy – ogrodniczki. 2 sceny 
DATA 8.05
STAWKA 400 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

💛 ODLOTOWY CASTING DO REKLAMY BANKU – STARTUJEMY! 💛

Szukamy nowych twarzy do wyjątkowego projektu reklamowego 💛
Bardzo mile widziani studenci szkół aktorskich!🤩

✨ KOGO SZUKAMY?

👩‍❤️‍👨 DZIEWCZYNY & CHŁOPAKI, DO BOJU! 👩‍❤️‍👨 WIEK: 18 - 26 LAT🎈

W całym castingu trzymamy się urody white caucasian.

ROLE GŁÓWNE:

👩 Dziewczyna (18–24)
Dziewczęca, naturalna, charyzmatyczna.
Szukamy osoby z energią swojego pokolenia, która swobodnie czuje się przed kamerą i z którą widz łatwo się utożsami.
Dłuższe włosy mile widziane, ale najważniejsze są umiejętności aktorskie.

👨 Chłopak (18–24)
Charyzmatyczny, zapadający w pamięć.
Z energią i autentycznością, która przyciąga uwagę.
Dłuższe włosy mile widziane, ale kluczowe są umiejętności aktorskie i swoboda przed kamerą.

🎭 ROLE EPIZODYCZNE

📅 TIMING:

27.04 (do KOŃCA DNIA) – termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

Dla wszystkich:
👉Wizytówka (obowiązkowa)

Plus standardowo - dane kontaktowe, zdjęcie portretowe oraz sylwetki ☺️

Role epizodyczne:
👉 tylko wizytówka

Nie możemy się doczekać, żeby Was zobaczyć przed kamerą ✨

SZCZEGÓŁY W LINKU: https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting033/

CASTING@UNAGIMEDIA.PL

TYTUŁ: 033 + POSTAĆ

items.text:
Szukamy modelek do filmu wizerunkowego marki kosmetycznej
Do realizacji filmu reklamowego dla marki kosmetycznej poszukujemy modelek o naturalnej, zadbanej i fotogenicznej urodzie.

Projekt skupia się na naturalnej prezentacji produktu w ujęciach beauty, skincare oraz lifestyle. 

Zależy nam na osobach, które dobrze prezentują się przed kamerą i mają świeży, zdrowy wygląd – nie wymagamy „instagramowej perfekcji”, ale estetycznej, spójnej aparycji odpowiedniej do produkcji reklamowej.

Wymagania:

* swoboda przed kamerą i naturalność w ruchu

* mile widziane doświadczenie w sesjach zdjęciowych lub produkcjach wideo

* naturalny wygląd (bez widocznych ingerencji medycyny estetycznej)

* zadbana, zdrowo wyglądająca cera

* zadbane dłonie i paznokcie

* proporcjonalna, estetyczna aparycja odpowiednia do materiałów reklamowych

Dodatkowa informacja:

Poszukujemy modelek o różnorodnych typach urody.

Ważne – zgłoszenia:

Bardzo prosimy o przesyłanie aktualnych zdjęć w dobrej jakości.

Szczegóły projektu:

* realizacja: produkcja wideo + sesja zdjęciowa (materiały promocyjne / social media)

* termin zdjęć: maj 2026 (dokładna data wkrótce)

* czas pracy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy

* lokalizacja: Katowice

Oferujemy:

* wynagrodzenie: 1000 zł netto

* catering na planie

Zgłoszenia:

Prosimy o przesłanie:

* kilku aktualnych zdjęć (twarz + sylwetka, w dobrej jakości) – mile widziane zdjęcia z sesji zdjęciowych

* informacji o wieku i wzroście

📩 na adres: renata@filmhouse.pl

items.text:
Mutige Darsteller/in in Düsseldorf und Umgebung gesucht 🎞🎥

Das wohl mutigste Kurzfilm Projekt steht uns bevor! 

Dazu werden noch Schauspieler und Komparsen gesucht! 🫵 (m/w/d)
Hast du Lust vor der Kamera zu stehen und kein Problem "Preußen" in die Welt zu rufen, dann bist du hier genau richtig!

🔲 Wann? Mai/Juni 2026
🔲 Wo? Raum Düsseldorf 
🔲 Gage? No Budget 

Die gemachten Aufnahmen dürfen für's persönliche Showreel frei genutzt werden. Für Verpflegung 🥘 ist gesorgt. Gage kann leider nicht gezahlt werden.

Ziel ist es einen modernen Kurzfilm in höchster Kinoqualität zu produzieren 💪

Bewerbung, bitte mit Infos (Alter, Schauspielerfahrung,...) und zwei Fotos als PN an mich!

Danke und viel Erfolg!
Aus Rheinprovinz

items.text:
I’ve seen a lot of debate recently about whether actors “need” social media.

I’ve worked in performance industry for 20+ years and in brand and marketing for another 6

I can confidently say that this conversation is going to become more and more important.

So the question I’d be asking:
What happens when someone looks you up?

Because they do.

And most actors are showing their work but not giving a clear sense of who they are.

I’m hosting a free live masterclass on 6th May at 7pm for actors who are already showing up online and want to make sure it’s actually working for their career.

Save your seat here:
https://go.audreyelizabeth.co.uk/thesocialspotlight

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'THE SOCIAL SPOTLIGHT BUILD A PERSONAL BRAND THAT OPENS OPPORTUNITIES THE NUMBER ONE MASTERCLASS FOR ACTORS ON HOW to TURN YOUR SOCIAL MEDIA INTO YOUR MOST POWERFUL CAREER TOOL FREE LIVE ONLINE TRAINING 6TH MAY 7:00PM SAVE YOUR SEAT TODAY THROUGH THE LINK IN THE CAPTION IG: :@AUDREYELIZABETHOFFICIAL'

Casting for an incredible cool music video! Male and female roles. Shooting some scenes Monday 27th April in Manchester UK. Cinematic narrative with elements of horror and gothic modernism! Voluntary , with an IMDb credit and images and footage for your portfolio.  Submitting to festivals . Have a listen on Spotify. Email enquiries to irishshowreelscasting@gmail.com 

Characters include bikers and rockers, office workers , burlesque dancers, lady killers and people with interesting faces!  All roles are very juicy. Email or DM images and mark as “music video”

Spotify 

https://open.spotify.com/artist/416Bwr5ukAONtKXYtWNx7j

🎭 ONLINE 1:1 ACTING COACH 🎬

Led by experienced tutors, these 30 or 60 minute sessions are fun, flexible and fully tailored to each child—building confidence, creativity, screen technique and more in a safe, supportive environment. Whether they’re just starting out, growing their talent or needing some help with a last minute self-tape, we offer support and guidance each step of the way in this ever-evolving industry!

Contact us today for more information - classes@mcaa.co.uk

🎬 CASTING STATYSTÓW – NOWY SERIAL PREMIUM! 🎬  
Kamedstudio  

Zapraszamy kobiety i mężczyzn (wiek 16+) mieszkających w Stanisławowie i okolicach (okolice Puszczy Kampinoskiej), do udziału w nagraniach nowego, współczesnego serialu premium!  

🎥 O serialu:  
„Konwojent” to historia mężczyzny w kryzysie wieku średniego, który, aby wyciągnąć rodzinę z długów, rozpoczyna ryzykowną grę — przy okazji całkowicie zmieniając swoje dotychczasowe życie.  

Producentem serialu jest Telemark (m.in. Heweliusz, Wielka Woda).  

📍 Lokalizacja: Stanisławów i okolice (Puszcza Kampinoska)  
📅 Zdjęcia: maj 2026  
💰 Stawki: od 120 zł netto/dzień zdjęciowy (w zależności od planu – dzienny lub nocny)  

To świetna okazja, żeby zobaczyć, jak wygląda plan filmowy „od kuchni”! 🎥  

📆 terminy nagrań:  
➡️  5 i 6 maja

📩 Zgłoszenia:  
dorota.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

➡️ W tytule maila wpisz: STANISŁAWÓW  

➡️ W treści podaj (wg punktów):  
- imię i nazwisko 
- 2 zdjęcia (portret + sylwetka)  
- numer telefonu  
- wiek  
- rozmiar ubrania  
- rozmiar buta  
- miejsce zamieszkania!!!  

Do zobaczenia na planie

items.text: Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic

sharedPost.text:
Do Niemieckiego serialu sensacyjnego „8 BILLION” poszukujemy statystów z Poznania lub okolic. To będą pojedyncze sceny, więc plany zdjęciowe nie będą trwały długo. Zdjęcia w Poznaniu w dniach od 28 kwietnia do 2 maja. Wynagrodzenie 201 zł brutto (189 zł na rękę).

KOGO SZUKAMY?
Na wtorek 28.04:
- Postawnych, wysokich mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Panów którzy wcielą się w postacie porywaczy/przestępców
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy
- Lokaja/Kamerdynera najlepiej o szpakowatych włosach
- Kelnera
- Kobiet i mężczyzn - klientów restauracji

Na środę 29.04:
- Postawnych, mężczyzn do roli ochroniarzy
- Kobietę i mężczyznę – pracowników biurowych
- Kobietę, pacjentkę w szpitalu
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na czwartek 30.04
- 20 kobiet i mężczyzn którzy wcielą się w rolę dziennikarzy

Na piątek  1.05
- Ochroniarza

Na sobotę 2.05
- Kierowcy z prawem jazdy

Na zgłoszenia czekamy do piątku 24.04 do godziny 9:00 rano.
Formularz do zgłoszenia oraz link do trailela w komentarzu

media.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'n.Π Do serialu poszukujemy dorosłych Statystów- kobiet i mężczyzn Zdjęcia w dniach 28.04-2.05.2026 w Poznaniu. Szczegóły w opisie B N >>> link do zgłoszenia w komentarzu <<< 8'

items.text:
## **CASTING CALL: BACKGROUND PERFORMERS (PAID* - Non union) 🎬**

We are looking for various background roles for an upcoming vertical production filming in **Richmond** **on April 21st, 2026.**

**❗️Please read the requirements carefully before applying.**
* **POLICE OFFICER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **REPORTER / VINTAGE CROWD:** Male, age: 18+
* **SHAREHOLDER:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **BOXER:** Male, age: 20s. Must have an athletic/fit build.
* **REFEREE:** Male, age: 20s–40s
* **CEO:** Male, age: 30s 
**HOW TO APPLY:**

Please send me a **Direct Message** on Facebook with the following:
1. The **role** you are applying for.
2. A **recent**, clear photo of yourself.
3. Confirmation that you are free for the **full day** on the 21st of April. (Must have **full-day availability**. While you likely won’t be needed for the entire day, we require a flexible schedule to accommodate production timing.) ***RATE:** $100 for a 5 hours

Thank you!

topComments.text: Hi so everything is for male only right?
I sent you a message last night

Casting Call
Hi there! I am casting a few more roles for my upcoming short film Star Cats. 

This is an unpaid non-union project. Meals will provided along with IMDB credits :)

Shooting dates are May 29-31, but each of these roles will only need to be there one of the days.

Please email me at Daisyjanemars@gmail.com if you'd like some sides!

🎶 CASTING CALL – NYC PERFORMERS 🎶

Booking local talent for a corporate event at the Javits Center:
• Saxophone player
• Drummers / bongo (strolling, high-energy)
• Soccer freestyle performers (short sets)

📅 7/28/26 | ⏰ 5–6 PM | 📍 NYC
Paid opportunity – local talent only

Please email info@kaccessvegas.com with:
• Headshot
• Reel/video
• Quote/ rate for 1-hour 

Submit by next week, before 4/30

Thanks! ✨

items.text:
Talent agent looking for babies 3 months to 24 months old

 (DO NOT DM ) 

Project Synopsis

NON UNION PRINT & VIDEO

SHOOT DATE: MAY 11 - MAY 15

*Multiple shoot days not guaranteed*

Shoot Location: Miami, FL

Talent must work as locals.

RATES: *+20% Agency Fee if applicable

ADULT SESSION RATE: $750+20% per 10 hour session, to include any and all potential fittings.

ADULT USAGE RATE IF RECOGNIZABLE:: $1,750+20% to include the below term, territory, and media.

Guaranteed at time of booking.

ADULT USAGE RATE IF UNRECOGNIZABLE:: $1,000+20% to include the below term, territory, and media.

Guaranteed at time of booking.

MINORS SESSION RATE: $350+20% per max time allowed on set, to include any and all potential fittings.

MINORS USAGE RATE: $750+20% to include the below term, territory, and media. Guaranteed at time of

booking.

USAGE

TERM: 3 years

TERRITORY: Worldwide

MEDIA: Digital, Paid social, Organic Social, Web, Email, OOH, Industrial and In-Store Signage (ie. for Walmart

displays, etc.)

You must be represented by Go Talent for this specific casting.

Kids Casting and Project Casting you do not have my permission to share this casting.

email agent@gotalentagency.com 

subject "Miami baby" 

send recent cell phone photo shoulders up and smiling.

items.text:
Für ein 1–2-stündiges Sandaletten-Shooting in NRW suche ich Personen mit Schuhgröße 39–43.

Das Shooting ist locker gehalten und auch für Menschen ohne Modelerfahrung geeignet.

Bei Interesse melde dich gern mit einer kurzen Nachricht. 👡✨

Ich arbeite nur mit respektvollen und offenen Personen – Menschen mit Vorurteilen oder negativer Einstellung sind hier fehl am Platz.

items.text:
Auditions for The Spitfire Grill
Auditions!!!

The Spitfire Grill-The Musical

Music and Book by James Valcq 

Lyrics and Book by Fred Alley

Directed by Ella Wyatt

Monday, April 27 @ 7pm

Callbacks: by invitation Wednesday, April 29 @ 7pm

Synopsis:

The musical depicts the journey of a young woman just released from prison, who decides to start her life anew in a rural town in Wisconsin. She participates in a journey within the town toward its own tenuous reawakening.

Please prepare a song of your choice, an accompanist will be provided. 32 bars

Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.

Cold reading sides will be provided at auditions.

Performances: July 10 to August 2, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm

Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees July 18 and August 1 at 2:00pm

Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente

Mon–Thurs, 7:00pm, with some Saturdays

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

(Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.)

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.

There is a $100 stipend offered

Character Breakdown can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaUN0c1JhV29JMUFpUWN1NXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5u2s8JPZvLnjKtydEhs6BkHxK8l8k9R3IXSoE2NwpyZkIXOADty48E_oY5Nw_aem_5edgXDemxfi2rbHAIpzVEQ)

items.text: Oferuję montaż demo aktorskiego, według aktualnych wymogów reżyserów obsady. Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :) 🎬

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.text:
WSPÓŁPRODUCENT – WARSZAWA 🎬

Do autorskiego filmu fabularnego z potencjałem festiwalowym szukam współproducenta, który wejdzie w projekt jako partner 

📍 Zdjęcia:
– 1 dzień w maju (dokładna data do ustalenia)
– Warszawa

💸 Projekt:
– niekomercyjny, artystyczny
– cel: festiwale 🎞️
– film jest już w trakcie realizacji (po pierwszym dniu zdjęciowym)

👥 Kogo szukam?
– osoby z doświadczeniem w produkcji
– z kontaktem / dostępem do finansowania
– która pomoże domknąć budżet i rozwinąć projekt
– myślącej strategicznie i działającej partnersko

To moment, żeby wejść w projekt i realnie wynieść go wyżej ✨

📩 Zainteresowanych zapraszam do kontaktu w komentarzu lub priv.

**BACKGROUND CASTING CALL FOR "JEWFACE" A SHORT FILM BY MELISSA CENTER:**

*A film centered around Jewish Identity is seeking BACKGROUND PERFORMERS. Copy, credit, and meals provided. Please email a headshot and one fun fact about yourself to HELLO@PINKAMONGMEN.COM.*

*We are so grateful for your interest and can't wait to hear from you!*

**BAT MITZVAH ATTENDEES:**

- SEEKING BOYS AND GIRLS AGES 11-15 FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

- SEEKING ADULTS + RELATIVES, MEN AND WOMEN AGES 20 - 60S FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

**SOFTBALL CAMP GOERS:**

**- **SEEKING GIRLS AGES 15 - 18, OR 18 TO PLAY YOUNGER FOR A JEWISH SUMMER CAMP SOFTBALL SCENE THAT TAKES PLACE IN THE YEAR 2000. FILMS IN MAPLEWOOD, NEW JERSEY, ON SATURDAY 4/18. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (YEAR 2000 WARDROBE)

**NYC STREET PASSERBYS:**

- QUEER, BIPOC INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. Ages 20s- 40s and 60-70s, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE )

- OLD JEWISH MAN: 80’S, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-BOUGIE ASIAN INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. AGES 30S-40S. FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-ARAB-LOOKING MAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-TOUGH-LOOKING MAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE- TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-PASSERBY #1: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-GORGEOUS WOMAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

🎬 SODIES KASI TV: THE "FOUNDING 40" RECRUITMENT 🎬

Meadowlands, it’s time to tell our own stories. We are building a media empire from the ground up, and we are looking for the hungry, the disciplined, and the visionaries to join us.

THE REALITY CHECK: We are a 100% grassroots startup. We are starting from scratch with:
❌ NO Tools/Equipment (We use our smartphones)
❌ NO Budget/Salary (We work for credits, experience, and growth)
❌ NO Physical Building (The streets of Meadowlands are our studio)

WHO WE NEED:

🎭 ACTORS (Leads & Extras)

Requirements: High discipline, emotional range, and commitment to the "2-on-2-off" schedule. No ego—just talent.

🔊 SOUND & TECHNICAL CREW

Requirements: An ear for detail. Must own a smartphone with storage space to help capture clear audio and shots.

✍️ SCREENWRITERS & CREATIVES

Requirements: Must love Kasi stories and be able to write scripts for local locations.

🏃 PRODUCTION ASSISTANTS (Hustlers)

Requirements: Punctual, organized, and ready to manage the set. If you are 5 minutes early, you are late!

WHY JOIN?
Build a professional portfolio, get listed in our "Green Book" Master Register, and be part of the crew that puts Meadowlands on the global map.

READY TO HUSTLE? APPLY NOW:
👉 https://form.svhrt.com/69b5fc522ac0ef04c5970eab

Casting call!!
Title: Love Thy Neighbor

Shooting: June 18th-June 21st in Savannah, GA

Student film for SCAD, not paid, nonunion 

If interested please go to sophiadarlingcasting.com or email Sophiadarling.casting@gmail.com with your headshot, resume, and what role you are interested in.   PLEASE READ NOTES FOR CHARACTERS

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Scott Myers Lead. Mixed, Woman, 28-36. A female attorney (and cannibal) with contempt for those who belittle her finds justice through consummation of her perceived aggressors. On paper, a sociopath, her desires for power and justice, sly nature, and impatience causes friction among strangers. Note: The character does handle firearm that is going to be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop IS. Will be shown smoking a cigarette and will be done practically using herbal cigarettes.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love Thy Neighbor Lainey Supporting. White, Woman, 20-25 Scott's client's niece, who was responsible for hiring Scott to represent her Uncle Nick. Caught in the middle the misunderstanding Lainey's concerned nature leads her to mix in with Scott's and her uncle's affairs. of Note: Will be in a scene with a firearm which will be a practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the pr is.'

May be an image of text that says 'Love LoveThyNeighbor Thy Neighbor Nicholas Burton Day Player. White, Male, 55-65. Scott's client, presumably a frequent offender. A "particular man" as his niece describes him, includes particularities of brashness, sexism, and intolerance for strangers. A "Don't Tread on Me" mentality. He iS casualty of Scott's murderous cannibalism. His desire is to have the upper hand and sovereignty leads to his downfall. Note: The character does handle a firearm that is going to be practical prop. A certified armorer will be present whenever the prop is.'

items.text:
**🎬 [CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM | LONDON]**

Hi everyone!

I’m currently casting for a **5 - 7 minute psychological drama short film**.

This project is a **director’s showcase piece** for film school application (NFTS), focused on atmosphere, emotion, and visual storytelling with minimal dialogue.

**SAYSORRY.ME**

The story follows a man trying to reconnect with someone he loves - but something feels wrong. The film explores **loss, regret, and the illusion of communication** in a quiet, intimate, and unsettling way.

The tone is grounded and realistic, with subtle psychological tension.

## **🎬 PROJECT PURPOSE **
* Director portfolio / film school submission
* Strong focus on performance, sound design, and visual storytelling
* Intended as a high-quality cinematic short

## **🎭 ROLES**
1. **LEAD (Male, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PARTNER (Any gender, 20-35)**
* Emotional, expressive through subtle acting
* Strong ability to perform with minimal dialogue
* Must carry the film

1. **PRESENTER (Female, 20-35)**
* Commercial-style performance
* Confident, warm, slightly “too perfect” tone
* Ability to speak directly to camera

## **📍**LOCATION 
* London, Battersea Power 

## **📅 SHOOT DETAILS** 
* Shoot date: TBC (mid-April)
* Casting deadline: **20th April (URGENT)**

## **💸 COMPENSATION **
* **Unpaid project**
* Travel (London zones) covered
* Food & drinks provided during the shoot
* Film credit + material for showreel

## **📩 TO APPLY **

Self-tape required for all roles.

Please DM or apply via StarNow [https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/](https://www.starnow.com/casting/saysorrycom-3141318/)

attachments.ocrText: Возможно, это изображение текст "SAY SORRY"

items.text:
🎬 This is your chance. Don't miss it.

We're beyond thrilled to announce an exclusive one-day screen acting workshop with BAFTA-winning director Farren Blackburn — and spaces are strictly limited.

Farren's credits speak for themselves: Gangs of London (Sky/AMC), Marvel's Daredevil, The Innocents (Netflix), The Winter King (ITVX/MGM), A Discovery of Witches, Luther, Doctor Who, and the feature film Shut In starring Naomi Watts. He is, quite simply, one of the most in-demand British directors working in film and TV today.

Opportunities like this don't exist. Directors of Farren's calibre don't do workshops. This is a genuine, once-in-a-career chance to get inside the mind of a world-class filmmaker — wherever you are in the world. Join us live on Zoom to work with him, learn from him, and understand exactly what he's looking for from actors on set.

👉 Tickets for this are in high demand. Book before 27th April for the early bird price of £19.99.

https://buy.stripe.com/00wcN5eb93oX8h43IOgnK0w

items.summary:
🎬 This is your chance. Don't miss it.

We're beyond thrilled to announce an exclusive one-day screen acting workshop with BAFTA-winning director Farren Blackburn — and spaces are strictly limited.

Farren's credits speak for themselves: Gangs of London (Sky/AMC), Marvel's Daredevil, The Innocents (Netflix), The Winter King (ITVX/MGM), A Discovery of Witches, Luther, Doctor Who, and the feature film Shut In starring Naomi Watts. He is, quite simply, one of the most in-demand British directors working in film and TV today.

Opportunities like this don't exist. Directors of Farren's calibre don't do workshops. This is a genuine, once-in-a-career chance to get inside the mind of a world-class filmmaker — wherever you are in the world. Join us live on Zoom to work with him, learn from him, and understand exactly what he's looking for from actors on set.

👉 Tickets for this are in high demand. Book before 27th April for the early bird price of £19.99.

https://buy.stripe.com/00wcN5eb93oX8h43IOgnK0w

items.text:
!!! PILNE !!!   GLINIARZE !!!    WARSZAWA !!! 30. KWIETNIA !!!

Do kwietniowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzny do roli:

Filip Grodzki (26 - 35) – pewny siebie, przekonany o słuszności polowania na pedofili, należy do grupy tropiącej pedofili, razem z Krzysztofem organizuje akcję pobicia Marcina. Z wyglądu normalny facet, ale charakterny 😉

Data: 30. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania pilnych zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Spot TV Kraków
[SPOT TV BUKMACHER - KRAKÓW - 04 i 05 MAJA 2026]

Szukamy na 04/05/26:

1) DZIARSKA STARSZA PANI - zdjęcia od 08:00 do 15:00, stawka 1000zł UoD

2) Kilku "dużych" chłopaków do roli kibiców - chętnie typ wikinga. Zdjęcia od 08:00 do 15:00, stawka 700 zł UoD 

3) Kilkunastu statystów do roli kibiców na trybunach, później jako kibice oglądający mecz w mieszkaniu (możemy zapewnić transport) - zdjęcia 08:00-20:00, płatne 300 zł po zdjęciach na podstawie umowy o dzieło, wiek obojętny

Szukamy na 05/05/26:

4) Kilku dziewczyn potrafiących grać w piłkę (wystarczy umiejętność prostego kopnięcia piłki) - zdjęcia od 08:00 do 15:00, stawka 250 zł UoD

TERMIN i MIEJSCE:

• Termin zdjęć: 4 i 5 maja 2026

• Kraków

TERMIN NADSYŁANIA ZGŁOSZEŃ :

• 28/04/2026 godzina 18:00

POLA EKSPLOATACJI:

• Internet + TV

Prawa: 18 miesięcy, terytorium Polska

ZGŁOSZENIA :

• Imię i nazwisko

• Numer telefonu

• Wiek

• Miasto (preferujemy osoby z Krakowa lub z bliskich okolic)

• 3-5 zdjęć (twarz, sylwetka, profile)

• Informacja o posiadanym doświadczeniu reklamowym, filmowym

• Wizytówka w formie linku prywatnego do YT/Vimeo etc. (przy wysyłaniu linków prywatnych prosimy o odblokowaniem opcji dostępu) - OBLIGATORYJNIE

• Informacja o dyspozycyjności we wskazanym dniu/dniach

• Informacja do jakiej roli się aplikuje

Zgłoszenia wysyłamy na adres casting@rednoses.pl w tytule wpisując „BUKMACHER”. Na ewentualne pytania odpowiadamy pod numerem telefonu +48 510 469 221.

Prawa: 18 miesięcy, terytorium Polska

ZGŁOSZENIA :

• Imię i nazwisko

• Numer telefonu

• Wiek

• Miasto (preferujemy osoby z Krakowa lub z bliskich okolic)

• 3-5 zdjęć (twarz, sylwetka, profile)

• Informacja o posiadanym doświadczeniu reklamowym, filmowym

• Wizytówka w formie linku prywatnego do YT/Vimeo etc. (przy wysyłaniu linków prywatnych prosimy o odblokowaniem opcji dostępu) - OBLIGATORYJNIE

• Informacja o dyspozycyjności we wskazanym dniu/dniach

• Informacja do jakiej roli się aplikuje

Zgłoszenia wysyłamy na adres casting@rednoses.pl w tytule wpisując „BUKMACHER”. Na ewentualne pytania odpowiadamy pod numerem telefonu +48 510 469 221.

items.text:
**WARSZAWA**

**30 kwietnia (czwartek)**

** **

*Proszę o nie zgłaszanie się panów, którzy już wysłali zgłoszenie*.

** **

**OSTATNI DZIEŃ I OSTATNIA SZANSA, ABY WZIĄĆ UDZIAŁ W PLANIE FILMU „KOSMONAUTA”**

 

Szukamy Statystów, **MĘŻCZYZN ok. 20-65 lat** do filmu fabularnego osadzonego w latach 70tych o znanym Polaku.

 

**Stawka 200 zł gotówką po planie (dzień zdjęciowy + charakteryzacja)**

** **

Charakteryzacja 28 lub 29.04 – termin do potwierdzenia

 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **KS 30**

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość

W załączniku: **zdjęcie twarzy (selfie) i sylwetki: TYLKO Z DNIA ZGŁOSZENIA + zdjęcie z profilu**

** **

**ZDJĘCIE TWARZY** - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

**ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI** – aktualne, cała sylwetka

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – MODELE / AKTORZY 🎬
Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn do udziału w nagraniu reklamy dla kliniki psychologicznej w Poznaniu.  

📍 Lokalizacja: Poznań  

📅 Termin: niedziela, 26 kwietnia  

💸 Stawka: 200 zł / godz.  

Szukamy osób swobodnie czujących się przed kamerą, z naturalną energią i autentycznością – zależy nam na prawdziwych emocjach, nie „sztywnym” aktorstwie.  

📌 Wymagana zgoda na wykorzystanie wizerunku w celach promocyjnych kliniki.  

📩 Zgłoszenia: napisz komentarz pod postem i dodaj link do swojego Instagrama lub portfolio.

items.text:
Just over a week ago, we crowned the Talent Search UK Champion — 14-year-old James Glithero Music from Stockport, Manchester, UK 🇬🇧

Since then, James’ world has truly taken off, stepping into the music industry in such an exciting way — and we couldn’t be prouder.

Keep up the incredible work, James… a star has been born ⭐

📸 Picture taken on the 24th of April 2026 — winner, James Glithero with his Talent Search UK trophy

Could it be you next? 

To be considered for the upcoming series head over to 
www.talentsearchuk.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL - LONDON 🎬

Looking for talent for an upcoming video project shooting in London (week commencing 26th May):

- 1 x Female model (late 20s-early 30s)
- 1 x Family of 3-4 Turkish family (or families with Middle Eastern/Mediterranean heritage) - Children aged 5-10

Shoot duration: 2 days

This is a paid opportunity.

If interested, send your rate and portfolio via message.

told her: “You should stay away from me.”

(DALLAS) LOOKING TO CAST ROLES ( TALENT MUST BE IN DALLAS)
FEATURE FILM / DARK COMEDY

TITLE: TOP HITTERS

LOCATION: DALLAS, TEXAS

PAID / MEALS / IMDB CREDIT

EVOLVE ENTERTAINMENT / BOOMTOWN PRODUCTIONS / MIGNON PICTURES

OPEN CASTING CALL

DATE: APRIL 18, 2026 

LOCATION: 3005 E Abram St

Arlington, TX 

                    

TIME: 2:00– 6:00 pm

PLEASE BRING: HEADSHOT & RESUME

ONLINE SUBMISSIONS

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT APRIL 20, 2026 

EMAIL INFORMATION TO: 

Tophittersmovie@gmail.com

PLEASE SEND PROFESSIONAL

HEADSHOT/RESUME/MONOLOGUE

SYNOPSIS: ON THE BRINK OF RETIREMENT, TWO LONG TIME DRUG RUNNERS ARE COERCED INTO BECOMING CONTRACT KILLERS.  UNABLE TO PULL THE TRIGGER, THEY SECRETLY HIDE THEIR INTENDED TARGETS, RISKING THEIR LIVES AS THEY TRY TO OUTSMART THE RUTHLESS UNDERWORLD THAT EXPECTS BODIES…

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

BIG MICKEY – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 30's TO EARLY 40's.

ROLANDO – HISPANIC MALE, EARLY 30’S, HEAVY SET BUILD, SLICK TALKER, MUST BE COMFORTABLE 

       WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

DUKE – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE, MID TO LATE 20’s, MEDIUM BUILT, MUST BE COMFORTABLE WITH 

              ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

ABRAHAM – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE EARLY 30’S, SLIM BUILD, SLICK TALKER, AMBITIOUS, MUST BE 

                      COMFORTABLE WITH ACTION PERFORMANCE, MURDER SCENES.

BIG EL KINGPIN – HISPANIC MALE, MID TO LATE 40’s, SHORT STOCKY, DRUG LORD.

BRUNO – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 20's TO EARLY 30's, MUSCULAR BUILD, ATHLETIC, BODYGUARD. 

TONY – HISPANIC MALE, LATE 20's TO EARLY 30's, MUSCULAR BUILD, ATHLETIC, BODYGUARD. 

DETECTIVE STEWART– OPEN RACE, LATE 40's, TALL , FIT, ATHLETIC BUILD, CROOKED COP. 

DETECTIVE SIMMS (ROOKIE COP) – CAUCASIAN MALE, MID 30's. 

BLUE – CAUCASIAN MALE, EARLY 30's, DRUG DEALER. 

BROTHER-IN-LAW  – CAUCASIAN MALE, LATE 30's TO EARLY 40's, SLIM BUILD, INTELLECTUAL TYPE WITH

                                    GLASSES. 

DETECTIVE BARRY WHITZ – AFRICAN AMERICAN MALE, LATE 40's, POLICE OFFICER , SOLID  BUILD, 

                                                  SERIOUS DEMENOR.

PHIL THE GIL – AFRICIAN AMERICAN MALE, EARLY 30's, CORNER BOY DRUG DEALER, SNITCH.

SANDRA (ROLANDO'S GIRLFRIEND)  –  CAUCASIAN FEMALE, EARLY 40's, FORMER PARTY GIRL PAST HER 

                                                                    PRIME.

ZADI –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, SERIOUS, NO-NONSENSE DEMEANOR.

GINA –  ASIAN FEMALE, 30's, FIT BUILD, BODYGUARD.

VICTIM #1 –  ASIAN MALE, 40's, GANGSTER, TOUGH GUY.

LEE –  ASIAN MALE, MID 30's.

WAITRESS –  AFRICAN AMERICAN FEMALE, 20's ,CURVY BUILD, SASSY. 

EMAIL INFORMATION TO:

Tophittersmovie@gmail.com

PLEASE SEND PROFESSIONAL

ONLINE SUBMISSIONS

DEADLINE TO SUBMIT APRIL 20, 2026

**BACKGROUND CASTING CALL FOR "JEWFACE" A SHORT FILM BY MELISSA CENTER:**

*A film centered around Jewish Identity is seeking BACKGROUND PERFORMERS. Copy, credit, and meals provided. Please email a headshot and one fun fact about yourself to **HELLO@PINKAMONGMEN.COM**.*

*We are so grateful for your interest and can't wait to hear from you!*

**BAT MITZVAH ATTENDEES:**

- SEEKING BOYS AND GIRLS AGES 11-15 FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

- SEEKING ADULTS + RELATIVES, MEN AND WOMEN AGES 20 - 60S  FOR A 1997 BAT MITZVAH SCENE IN A JEWISH THEMED FILM, FILMS ON THURSDAY 4/16 IN THE EAST VILLAGE. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP READY WITH 90S LIKE WARDROBE (TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

**SOFTBALL CAMP GOERS:**

**- **SEEKING GIRLS AGES 15 - 18, OR 18 TO PLAY YOUNGER FOR A JEWISH SUMMER CAMP SOFTBALL SCENE THAT TAKES PLACE IN THE YEAR 2000. FILMS IN MAPLEWOOD, NEW JERSEY, ON SATURDAY 4/18. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (YEAR 2000 WARDROBE)

**NYC STREET PASSERBYS:**

- QUEER, BIPOC INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. Ages 20s- 40s and 60-70s, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE )

- OLD JEWISH MAN: 80’S, FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-BOUGIE ASIAN INDIVIDUALS AND COUPLES. AGES 30S-40S. FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-ARAB-LOOKING MAN:  FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-TOUGH-LOOKING MAN: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE- TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

-PASSERBY #1: FILMS ON FRIDAY 4/17 IN BROOKLYN HEIGHTS. ADDRESS & SHOOT TIMES PROVIDED UPON CONFIRMATION. MUST ARRIVE HAIR & MAKEUP + WARDROBE READY (PRESENT DAY WARDROBE - TEAM WILL PROVIDE GUIDANCE)

items.text:
Hume Baugh here: I'm doing a scene study class Tuesday May 12-Tuesday June 16, 2026 7-10 pm at The Practice Room 688 Richmond West Rm. 302, Toronto. We will be working on scenes and monologues. You can bring a couple of scenes to the first class, in which we will choose what to work on. You will have lots of time to work on your scene each class, and can work outside of class if you wish. The work will focus on objectives, the scene partner, and the actor's dynamic presence in the room, using one's authentic self. Come and join us - it will be fun, informal, and informative. Get in touch at humebaugh@yahoo.ca if you're interested.

I have been an actor, director and teacher for 43 years in Toronto and elsewhere. I have taught at George Brown, Sheridan College, Fanshawe College, and privately. My acting credits include Stratford, Shaw, Canadian Stage, Tarragon, Factory, Passe Muraille, Theatre Rusticle, Threshold Theatre, Young People's Theatre, Shakespeare in the Rough, Festival of Classics, Blue Ceiling Dance, Ecce Homo, and One Little Goat, among many others. 

I have directed Drums in the Night, Of Mice and Men, The Winter's Tale, (Fanshawe College), ABD with Mark the C (Threshold Theatre), All's Well That Ends Well (Alchemy), Child Hood (Summerworks), Twelfth Night, Therac 25 (Direct Flight Theatre). 

Cost is only $150, payable by etransfer to humebaugh@yahoo.ca upon acceptance into class, first come first served.

THIS IS A GREAT CLASS! Hume really knows his stuff! - Charlotte Moore

items.text:
🎭 Question for actors wanting to level up their craft and career?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley. I’m an actress who has worked on international film and television projects, including two Netflix series. I starred in Clint Eastwood’s Jersey Boys and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit show Once Upon a Time.

I’m currently opening a limited number of spots for 1:1 coaching sessions for adult actors.

These sessions are ideal for actors who want focused support with accents (Standard American, RP British), audition preparation, and refining their technique.

Sessions run for 1 hour via Zoom and can include:

• Accent coaching (American, RP, and more)
• Audition preparation for film, television, and self-tapes
• Script analysis and character work
• Self-tape technique and performance adjustments

These are tailored one-on-one sessions, so we can focus on what you need - whether that’s general skill development or preparing for an upcoming audition.

I also offer a career coaching and mentorship program for actors looking for guidance in navigating the industry.

Feel free to send me a message for more details or to book a spot.

items.text:
Die mobile „Ferrari Club Deutschland e.V. Hausband“ stellt sich vor ☝️
🟪 Kabellos Mobil Band 🟪

sharedPost.text:
Der Ferrari Club Deutschland

Im Juni 2010 lernten wir uns auf Sylt kennen!
Seit dem verbindet uns eine vertrauensvolle Beziehung und Zusammenarbeit. 
Ich bin stolz und glücklich so einen Kunden über so eine lange Zeit zu bedienen und denke es ist eine Art „Ritterschlag“,  der uns in unserer Szene auszeichnet. 

Da ist einfach dieses spezielle Vertrauen, dass man immer wieder in uns setzt. 

Nun waren wir wieder einmal mit den Ferraristi unterwegs. 

Um 16 Uhr starteten wir am Bootsanleger an Kameha Grand Hotel in Bonn auf einem Rheinschiff in Richtung Kölner Altstadt. 

Nach einem Fußweg von 1,4 km kamen wir im „Sünner im Walfisch“ an, wo wir den FERRARI CLUB bis um 23:00 Uhr bespielten. 

🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 hat gestern mit der neuen Besetzung, der überarbeiteten Song Auswahl und neuer energetischer Präsenz einen weiteren Meilenstein in Reihen des Ferrari Clubs Deutschland e.V. gesetzt. 

Solche Kunden fühlen, sehen und verstehen, dass man im Einsatz vor Ort MEHR als Musik bietet ☝️ 

Die Kritik und Empathie, die man 
🟪 Kabellos 2.0 🟪 entgegen brachte, suchte seinesgleichen!

Solche Feedbacks sorgen bestimmt mit dafür, dass man nach 40 Jahren professionellem, musikalischen Status und fast 5000 gespielten Auftritten immer noch für seine Sache brennt, wie am ersten Tag 😍👍

#kabellosmobilband
#ferrariclubdeutschland
#galaband
#mobilemusik
#professionalmusicians

items.text:
BOEING BOEING ACTOR CALL OUT!
Rowntree Players are delighted to announce that audition registration for Boeing Boeing is now open✈️

Don’t miss your chance to be part of this fast-paced, hilarious comedy — we’d love to see you there!

Register now and get ready for take-off… 👀✨

Click the link to read our audition pack and register - https://www.rowntreeplayers.co.uk/ 

🎭 Boeing Boeing

📅 23rd - 25th July 2026

📍 The Joseph Rowntree Theatre, York

Cleared for Takeoff: A High-Flying Farce!�This 1960s French farce adapted for the English-speaking stage features self-styled Parisian lothario Bernard, who has Italian, German and American fiancées, each a beautiful airline hostess with frequent “layovers.” He keeps “one up, one down, and one pending” – until unexpected schedule changes bring all three to Paris, and Bernard’s apartment, at the same time.
items.title: Home | Rowntree Players - York

items.text:
Heya
Just wanted to introduce myself. I’m based between Brighton and London, and have had a strong passion for creation and expression.  I have a strong interest in projects that lean into more depth and emotion. 

I’m always happy and open to collaborate and get involved wherever I can, whether that’s on screen, or supporting the wider creative process. I appreciate being a part of projects that aim to create something a little different.

Looking forward to connecting with you all and seeing what’s we could work on!

items.text:
Hello! I’m a professional hairstylist based in London with over 7 years of experience.

I’m currently looking for a model for a free creative haircut to build my portfolio. This is a great opportunity if you’re open to a fresh, stylish look and would like a high-quality cut at no cost.

If you’re interested, please send me a message with a recent photo of your hair. I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

Thank you!

items.text:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin

items.summary:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin
items.title: Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente

items.text:
🎥 We're looking for people to share their mental health struggles and experiences for a short feature documentary being sent to multiple film festivals such as, Sundance, Tiff, etc.
We want these stories to be impactful and meaningful for the audience.
All stories can be shot at home with a cellphone or any recording devices.

Record a raw and impactful footage talking about a mental health struggle you have battled or are currently battling. Don't forget to answer the How, What, Where & When questions when telling your journey!

Footage must be less than 30 minutes.
Must be recorded in landscape mode.
Must be able to show vulnerability & real emotions (no acting).
Must be TRUE stories.
Must start the video as if you're adjusting the camera.
Must receive submissions before September 1st
Non-union, not compensated

TO SUBMIT :
Send your name, age, a short bio, country, city, your mental health struggle, a headshot, a full body shot, and your video to
cloudzillainquiries@gmail.com

*optional : send your social media handle(s).
We look forward to listening to your stories and creating powerful impacts to help others who may be struggling.

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.
No photo description available.

topComments.text: I think this is a beautiful idea but sharing stories with an anonymous participant seems odd to me.  I myself am hoping to bring more awareness and help to mental health but not through an anonymous post.  People deserve connection and to talk to a real human 💕 helping empower people,  not exposing them

items.text:
CASTING CALL – DOCUMENTARY FILM (LOS ANGELES)

Independent documentary film casting real people for an international festival project.

This film explores the experience of living “in between” — the phase between who you were and who you are trying to become. The project is built around themes of transformation, identity, dual life, and the emotional cost of pursuing a dream.

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR:
 • Actors, performers, and creatives based in Los Angeles
 • Age range: 25–80
 • All genders and backgrounds welcome

We are looking for individuals who are currently living in an “in-between” phase of life:
 • balancing artistic ambition with survival work
 • navigating uncertainty, reinvention, or long-term pursuit of a dream
 • experiencing a gap between expectation and reality

This is not about acting performance — we are looking for real stories, presence, and authenticity.

PROJECT DETAILS:
 • Independent festival-driven documentary film
 • The project already has press coverage, with further media exposure planned
 • Intended for international festival circuit and press distribution

COMPENSATION:

This is a paid project. Compensation will be discussed individually depending on participation and scope.

HOW TO APPLY:

Please send:
 • A short self-tape (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself
 • A brief description of your story

Include:
 • Name
 • Age range
 • Location
 • Current occupation

Email: casting@vorion.studio

NOTE:

This is a selective documentary project. Only selected participants will be contacted.

topComments.text: Sounds good.  My book is in Amazon it sounds almost what your documentary.

Join the Creative Circle — Future Opportunities
Hee creatives!

I’m developing an immersive art & theatre project in London, and we’re wrapping up our crew. If you’re an actor, writer, director, or any form of artist, we’d love to stay connected—we’re always looking for creatives for future opportunities!

Follow for updates:
Personal Instagram: @sunnyleevandijk
Production Company: @piratequeen_productions

Or drop your email in this form [https://forms.gle/v6Y4TJ2a2AU2KSRq5](https://forms.gle/v6Y4TJ2a2AU2KSRq5) to be first to hear about new calls, early invites, and behind-the-scenes updates. Let’s build something awesome together!

Spot TV Kraków
[SPOT TV BUKMACHER - KRAKÓW - 04 i 05 MAJA 2026]

Szukamy na 04/05/26:

1) DZIARSKA STARSZA PANI - zdjęcia od 08:00 do 15:00, stawka 1000zł UoD

2) Kilku "dużych" chłopaków do roli kibiców - chętnie typ wikinga. Zdjęcia od 08:00 do 15:00, stawka 700 zł UoD 

3) Kilkunastu statystów do roli kibiców na trybunach, później jako kibice oglądający mecz w mieszkaniu (możemy zapewnić transport) - zdjęcia 08:00-20:00, płatne 300 zł po zdjęciach na podstawie umowy o dzieło, wiek obojętny

Szukamy na 05/05/26:

4) Kilku dziewczyn potrafiących grać w piłkę (wystarczy umiejętność prostego kopnięcia piłki) - zdjęcia od 08:00 do 15:00, stawka 250 zł UoD

TERMIN i MIEJSCE:

• Termin zdjęć: 4 i 5 maja 2026

• Kraków

TERMIN NADSYŁANIA ZGŁOSZEŃ :

• 28/04/2026 godzina 18:00

POLA EKSPLOATACJI:

• Internet + TV

Prawa: 18 miesięcy, terytorium Polska

ZGŁOSZENIA :

• Imię i nazwisko

• Numer telefonu

• Wiek

• Miasto (preferujemy osoby z Krakowa lub z bliskich okolic)

• 3-5 zdjęć (twarz, sylwetka, profile)

• Informacja o posiadanym doświadczeniu reklamowym, filmowym

• Wizytówka w formie linku prywatnego do YT/Vimeo etc. (przy wysyłaniu linków prywatnych prosimy o odblokowaniem opcji dostępu) - OBLIGATORYJNIE

• Informacja o dyspozycyjności we wskazanym dniu/dniach

• Informacja do jakiej roli się aplikuje

Zgłoszenia wysyłamy na adres casting@rednoses.pl w tytule wpisując „BUKMACHER”. Na ewentualne pytania odpowiadamy pod numerem telefonu +48 510 469 221.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - “The Sins of Our Father” - NON-UNION

Hi All! We're almost done casting for "The Sins of Our Father", but we're just missing our three main characters younger selves.

Maddie: 14 years, white, women-presenting. **Analytical. Caring. Avoidant.**

Leland: 10-12 years, white, male-presenting. **Free-spirited. Lax. Unbothered.**
Julian: 5-8 years, white, male presenting. **Geeky. Sentimental. Quick-witted.**

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, and each character is only needed for 1-3 scenes, in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If your kid is interested in being apart of this amazing project please email their headshot and the name of the character they're auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Friday May 1st.

topComments.text: Can I play maddie as a 21 year old white male

Julian: 5-8 years, white, male presenting. **Geeky. Sentimental. Quick-witted.**

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, and each character is only needed for 1-3 scenes, in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If your kid is interested in being apart of this amazing project please email their headshot and the name of the character they're auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Friday May 1st.

items.text:
Horror Web Series Casting Call in Thornton CO
CASTING CALL - Micro Vertical Found Footage Horror Web Series

Title: "CHAPTER 0"

Logline: A few weeks bedore a new horror escape room's grand opening, unusual experiences cause a paranoid employee to be concerned about the real-life maniac whose grisly murders inspired the game.

Genre: Found Footage Horror

Format: 10 (2-3 minutes each) vertical webisodes

Writer/Directors: Jerrod D. Brito (https://www.sharpspoonpictures.com/about-us.html) & Chris Guite

Executive Producer: Tim Carillo

Shooting Dates: A few flexible shooting nights between May 1st and May 30th

Locations: Thornton, CO

Roles:

RILEY (Lead)

Age: 18-22

Description: A new hire who doesn't enjoy horror, but took a Game Master job at a nearby escape room for the flexible hours and the ability to do homework there at night while waiting for deliveries in the weeks before the escape room opens. Riley is easily spooked, enjoys making vlogs, and though he/she/they isn't afraid of ghosts, nothing chills Riley more than real-life killers.

* These shorts will be roughly scripted, but in the spirit of found footage films, we are primarily looking for natural influencer-type personalities who are able to ad-lib when necessary.

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 3-4 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

ROBERT (Cameo)

Age: ???

Description: It could be a tall man in all black, lurking in the shadows, or it could just be our imaginations, our sleepless eyes playing tricks on us. Only our editor knows for sure...

Rate: Let's talk about it.

Duration: 1 month-ish (only a few shoot days, very flexible.)

Shooting Dates: 2-3 flexible nights between May 1st and May 30th, up to 2 hours each.

AUDITION INFO: If you're interested in these roles, please send an email, headshot, resume, your desired fee, and any relevant reels or samples to jerrodbrito@gmail.com with the subject "CHAPTER 0" for consideration. Selected performers will be asked to submit a short video audition based on a prompt.

Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Where You Came From

Genre: Comedy

Logline: Mauri is leaving for Africa... her mom isn't so sure about that...

Role: Frank. Between late forties and early sixties. Frank is a little bit of a mess, but he is Mauri's father through and through. He's supportive, unprofessional, and maybe a little hungover.

Production Company: This is a UCCS capstone film by Joseph Impellitteri with Christian Winkler and Onyx Riccelli producing

Production Type: Student Film

Contact Information: email me at jvitoimp@gmail.com or text me at 859-444-7502

Run Time: Short (~10 min)

Compensation: Paid ($25)

Union Status: Non-Union (not a hard line though)

Audition Information: Reach out to me; all auditions will be digital

Shooting Schedule: May 3rd, all day (12 hour shoot). Tentatively, 7 am-7 pm

Filming Location: Old North End in Colorado Springs (near downtown)

Project Description: I think the script is funny (bias). If you like comedy, message me!

topComments.text:
If you need an angsty teen anywhere in there… hit me up! 😂 
I have a 13yo who is ready to perform! 🙌🏽

items.text:
Hello everyone 🙂

CASTING CALL BLACK, ASIAN OR MIXED ACTRESS (VOICE OVER ROLE FOR VIDEO GAME)

I am currently casting for a narrative-driven VR project at Escape Studios titled Heavy is the Crown, and I am looking for a voice actress to portray the lead role of Lenore Vespen.

Lenore is a complex, emotionally layered character, and the performance is voice-over led, with a strong focus on internal monologue, subtlety, and psychological depth.

For this role, we are specifically seeking a Black, Asian or mixed-race actress, as the character is of African and Asian heritage.

I would love to invite any actress interested to submit a self-tape for the role. Please find attached the casting brief, which includes full details of the project and a monologue for audition.

This is a student industry project with a £100 honorarium, offering a strong, narrative-focused piece for showreel, as well as collaboration within a semi-professional production environment.

Self-tape deadline is set on April 30th and the recording session will take place on the week starting May 4th, the day will be set at the actress's convenience.

Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions—I’d be very happy to provide further information.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

Don’t hesitate to share to any actress you think might fit the role I would really appreciate it,

Thanks,

Mary-Jane
Director

items.text:
Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on either Sunday 12th April or Monday 13th April, depending on what is most convenient

Many thanks

Just over a week ago, we crowned the Talent Search UK Champion — 14-year-old James Glithero Music from Stockport, Manchester, UK 🇬🇧

Since then, James’ world has truly taken off, stepping into the music industry in such an exciting way — and we couldn’t be prouder.

Keep up the incredible work, James… a star has been born ⭐

📸 Picture taken on the 24th of April 2026 — winner, James Glithero with his Talent Search UK trophy

Could it be you next? 

To be considered for the upcoming series head over to 
www.talentsearchuk.com

items.text:
****CASTING CALL FOR INDEPENDENT SHORT FILM*****

**TITLE: **Vinyl Nights

**DIRECTOR: **Brandon Maxwell

**CONTACT: **gyrescapefilm@gmail.com

**SHOOT DATE: **June 2026 (date dependent on availability) in Los Angeles

**GENRE: **LGBTQ+ period rom-com

**LOGLINE: **Billy and Tommy, two seemingly polar-opposite waiters at a small-town diner, form an unexpected connection in their late-night shifts. As their relationship deepens, they’re forced to confront the limitations of their small town and decide whether love is something they can afford to risk in pursuit of their big dreams.

-------- 

**ROLES:**

**All roles are paid and must be comfortable with same-sex kissing. Dance experience preferred as well.**

**Billy **(Lead, male-presenting, 18-27)
* Artsy, expressive, and a little guarded
* Dreams of leaving town to pursue Broadway
* Uses humor and attitude to mask his true emotions

**Tommy **(Lead, male-presenting, 18-27)
* High school jock type
* Confident, grounded, sincere
* Dreams of being a writer but grapples with his family values

If interested, please comment your email and role(s) of interest below and I’ll reach out with more info! Please do not DM as those will not be read. Self tapes and headshots will be requested for each part. :)

topComments.text: Hello! My email is lamont.pennie20@gmail.com. I’m interested in the role of Billy but would be open o reading for Tommy as well!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — JOHNS HOPKINS UNIVERSITY GRADUATE FILM  

“THE BAPTISM”

MAY 2 & 3 SHOOT DAYS

📍 Location: Baltimore, MD

Two young cousins face the risk of their close relationship changing due to one of them partaking a baptism. 

We are seeking talented actors for an upcoming Johns Hopkins University graduate‑level film project. Full project and role details are available on the attached flyer.

✨ ROLES NOW CASTING (Haitian/Black Talent):
JUDY  
• Age: 35–45
• Fluent in Haitian Creole (required) 
  - will consider Afro Caribbeans if not Haitian

MANMI ESSÉ  
• Age: 60–75
• Fluent in Haitian Creole (required)
  - will consider Afro Caribbeans if not Haitian

Open to talent from DMV / PA / DE

💼 COMPENSATION:  
This is a deferred‑payment opportunity within a student‑film budget.
• Travel compensation available (mileage‑based)
• On‑set meals provided
• IMDb/credit included

🎥 SUBMISSION MATERIALS:  
• Reel(s)
• Headshot(s)

Please reach out if interested! Email in the flyer. You can also reach out via Messenger.

LOOKING FOR THE FOLLOWING TALENTS JUDY: 35-45 YEARS OLD, HAITIAN, CREOLE FLUENCY REQUIRED 2 MANMI ESSÉ: 60-75 YEARS OLD, HAITIAN, CREOLE FLUENCY REQUIRED SEND SENDSUBMISSIONSTO: SUBMISSIONS SHELLOBUG15@GMAIL.COM SHELLOBUG15'

items.text:
CASTING CALL: New Project Shooting this August!

Project Title: Shades of Identity

Type: independent film

Be part of a powerful story that explores the raw realities of colorism, sisterhood, and the courage to be seen. We are seeking 30+ diverse extras of all backgrounds and styles to help bring the world of Shades of Identity to life. This is an unpaid project, but it is a major opportunity to gain on-set experience, secure high-quality footage for your reel/portfolio, and earn an official film credit. The roles we need to fill.

We are officially casting for an upcoming project and would love to see your talent! Since we are keeping things streamlined, auditions will be held entirely online. WE SHOOT IN THE BOSTON’S AND SOMERVILLE AREA.

The Details
Shoot Date: August 2026

How to Apply: Choose a monologue for the role you’re interested in, record your self-tape, and email it directly to me!

Character Breakdown
We are looking for the following roles:

Lena (16–23): Black/Dark-skinned.

Maya (16–23): Black/Light-skinned.

Ashley (16–23): Plus-size.

Erica (16–23)

Theresa (16–23)

Aaron (16–23): The gay best friend; charismatic and loyal.

Tyla (16–23): The "mean girl" with a colorist attitude.

Camilla (16–23): Tyla’s sidekick.

Mr. Jones (45–55): The father figure; grounded and protective.

Therapist (35–55): Calm, professional, and observant.

Ready to Submit?
Please send your video auditions to: bmg30genzpub@gmail.com 

Tag a friend who would be perfect for one of these roles! We can't wait to see your submissions. 🎥🌟

We’re looking for six people aged 18-35 with relevant and authentic interests in one or all of the following: photography, hiking, camping, cycling.  Lovers of the outdoors.  Fans of Gorpcore and Outdoorwear Style.

We’re specifically looking for:

1 x Korean Male

1 x Japanese Female 

Dates: 1 or 2 days over the window 19 20 21 22 May 2026

Budget: $600 per day plus $1250 buyout.

Usage: 5 years in all media except OOH and DOOH, but including retail and CTV.  

Please share details of your relevant interests and submit a selection of recent pictures to jack@tcolondon.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL: PAID SHORT FILM
We are currently casting for a Canada Council / BC Arts Council-funded short film set for production in late May. Details below!

**LOGLINE**: On her final shift at her family’s struggling business, a young woman grapples with mounting guilt as she prepares to leave for university, knowing it will mean leaving her immigrant parents behind.

**PRODUCTION DATES**: Tuesday, May 19th - Sunday, May 24th, 2026

**RATES**: $200 per day

Both **UNION AND NON-UNION** encouraged to submit!

We are looking for the following characters:

**MAMAN** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker.

Maman is a sharp, no-nonsense mother who is practical, blunt, and often unintentionally funny. Beneath it all is someone who has sacrificed deeply and holds everything together, expressing her love through control, criticism, and constant caretaking.

**BABA** (45-70's): Persian. Native Farsi speaker. Aloof, kind, often in his own world.

Baba is a gentle, soft-spoken man who was once educated and respected but has quietly let that life go. He is polite and peacekeeping, with a quiet dignity shaped by sacrifice, and only pushes back when he has to.

**Please submit your materials to eastvancasting@gmail.com**

Thank you!

items.text:
Hey everyone! 

I’ve been modeling here and there for a little over two years now but I finally want to make it a more consistent, serious part of my life. 

I’m putting together a new, fresh portfolio with some shots and projects I’ve worked on in the past include brands like Garmin, Oakley, Vuori etc. 

However, the problem I’m running into is that I’m not sure exactly what photos are the best to add to the portfolio. I don’t have the exact “eye” the agents have to identify which photos best capsulate my image. 

I’m wondering if anyone wouldn’t mind helping me out and going through my Instagram, seeing my past projects and help me identity the best photos to add to my portfolio that would help give agencies the best chance to notice me. 

I would greatly appreciate any help, thank you so much!! 

Instagram: @colewwalkerr 

-Cole Walker

items.title: Hey everyone!

items.text:
ACTING & IMPROV PROGRAM
with Wojciech Medyński

3 months. One group. Real progress.

This is a focused, long-term training for actors and creatives who want to go deeper into the craft.

Not drop-ins. Not surface-level exercises.

A consistent group working week by week on presence, character, and truthful performance.

We use improvisation as a tool to unlock spontaneity, connection, and real reactions on stage.

WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

On-stage presence and confidence
Character building and objectives
Emotional truth and connection
Listening and reacting in the moment
Improvisation as a foundation for acting
Scene work in pairs and ensemble

WHO THIS IS FOR

Actors, performers, and curious beginners who are ready to commit.

You don’t need experience.
You need willingness to show up and work.

FORMAT

Closed group
Once a week
2 hours per session
3-month program

Small group to keep the work focused and personal.

INSTRUCTOR

Wojciech Medyński

Professional actor working across theatre, film, and television.
Trained at the Łódź Film School.
Experience in Teatr Jaracza and Teatr Syrena in Warsaw.

DETAILS

Atlas Tower, Warsaw
Starts in May

Exact day and time confirmed based on the group.

PRICE

1500 PLN full program
500 PLN monthly option

Limited spots.

If you’re ready to commit and go deeper, join us.

Presented by Impact Warsaw
Perform. Create. Connect.

items.text:
**Sesja zdjęciowa**

Gdzie: **Warszawa**

Kto: **fotograf**

Kogo: **modela**, chłopaka o szczupłej/sportowej sylwetce

Brak wymaganego doświadczenia w pozowaniu, wystarczą chęci

Kiedy: **25 kwiecień 2026 sobota**

**Sesja zdjęciowa na zasadach TFP czyli pozowanie za zdjęcia.**

Do projektu fotograficznego w celu poszerzenia własnego portfolio szukam modela. Tak jak wcześniej pisałem, nie wymagam doświadczenia w pozowaniu. Sesja obejmuje zdjęcia portretowe, sylwetkowe i akty. Miejsce: jedna z warszawskich galerii w okolicy dworca zachodniego. Zależy mi m.in. na pokazaniu emocji całym ciałem. Szczegóły do omówienia w PW. Tylko osoby pełnoletnie.

**PS.** Zdjęcie dla uwagi

items.text:
Christian Weiße in "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze", Spannung, Präsenz und glaubwürdige TV-Momente 

In der Folge "Mein Auto, dein Auto" aus "Auf Streife - Die neuen Einsätze" bin ich in einem der spannendsten Handlungsstränge des Formats zu sehen. Aus einem scheinbar harmlosen Moment beim Magnetangeln wird plötzlich eine hochexplosive Lage, genau diese Verdichtung aus Alltag, Zuspitzung und glaubwürdigem Spiel macht für mich den besonderen Reiz solcher Produktionen aus. 

Mein Dank geht an Joyn, Sat.1 und ganz besonders an filmpool für ein Format, das Tempo, Spannung und Publikumsnähe so wirkungsvoll verbindet. Solche Produktionen zeigen, wie wichtig jedes präzise gesetzte Bild, jede glaubwürdige Reaktion und jede stimmige Figur für die Gesamtwirkung einer Szene ist. 

Ich bringe in solche Einsätze nicht nur natürliche Präsenz vor der Kamera ein, sondern auch ein tiefes Verständnis für Bildwirkung, Timing, Atmosphäre und Produktionsabläufe. Genau diese Verbindung aus Darsteller, Content Creator, Produzent und Kameramensch macht mich für unterschiedlichste Formate interessant, ob TV, Werbung, Doku-Fiction, Social Ads oder fiktionale Stoffe mit realitätsnaher Tonalität. 

Wer für fiktive zukünftige Projekte einen verlässlichen, kameraaffinen und vielseitig einsetzbaren Darsteller sucht, findet in mir eine starke, professionelle und teamorientierte Besetzung mit Gespür für Szenen, Menschen und Wirkung. Köln ist meine Basis, Einsätze gern auch darüber hinaus. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Trauerreden Engelsfeder mit Herz aka Meine FSJ und BFD Erlebnisse und Partner von Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation aka Sanny4me aka Elternnotperfect 

#ChristianWeiße #AufStreife #AufStreifeDieNeuenEinsätze #Joyn #Sat1 #filmpool #Darsteller #Showreel #Schauspiel #Kleindarsteller #Komparse #TVProduktion #ScriptedReality #Storytelling #Kameraaffin

items.text:
CASTING CALL - EDGAR ALLAN POE SPEAKEASY EVENT (PAID)
Seeking talented, local actors in Pittsburgh, PA ages 21-45 for a pop-up cocktail event.

Our performances feature actors delivering compelling dramatic monologues based off of Edgar Allan Poe's works. Must be available to work Thursday April 30th - Sunday May 5th. 

Role Requirements: 
* Memorize and perform a dramatic 8-10 minute monologue for an intimate theater audience in a small venue setting that prioritizes mood, atmosphere, and connection with the audience. 
* Must be reliable, professional, punctual and able to work with a team
* Ability to deliver intense, emotionally rich monologues
* Experience with solo or immersive performance a plus
* Comfortable performing multiple times in one night
* Experience with serving (optional, for additional pay) and/or customer service a plus, but not required

This is a unique role combining acting, improv and bartending/serving skills (optional, for additional pay) in a fast-paced, guest facing environment.

If interested please email sierra@rockstarbeer.com with headshot, resume & contact info. Audition materials will be sent to inquiring email. Inquire about serving as well for additional pay!

items.text:
A Student Film

*Meet THE MANDELAS*
A 90s-style comedy about a family, a girlfriend, and a secret that won't stay hidden. In a world of new beginnings, Thabo is looking for a way out, the Reverend is looking for the truth, and Lerato is just looking for a nice dinner.

Dinner is served. Confession is mandatory. 

We’re looking for: 
Young Male (20s)
Young Woman (20s)
Older Man (40+)
Older Woman (30+)

Able to speak Xhosa

For more information. Contacts are on the poster🙏
